---
title: "Contact"
description: "Contact and recruiting information for LEMA Lab at the National University of Singapore."
---

::: {.page-hero}

# Contact
:::

::: {#openings .section}
::: {.section-heading}

## Open Positions
:::

::: {.application-callout}
::: {.application-copy}
For PhD, postdoc, and visiting student inquiries, please submit the form first. Include a CV, research interests, and links to representative work when available.
:::
::: {.application-action}
[Application Form](https://forms.office.com/r/xrW0nmy1Gi?origin=lprLink){.btn .btn-primary}
:::
:::

::: {.opportunity-grid}
::: {.opportunity-card}
### PhD Students

For PhD applicants, please also follow the [NUS CS PhD application process](https://www.comp.nus.edu.sg/programmes/pg/phdcs/application/#deadline) by June 15 (spring intake) or Dec 15 (fall intake).
:::
::: {.opportunity-card}
### Postdoctoral Researchers

For postdoc applicants, please include a CV, representative papers, reference contacts, and possible project directions.
:::

::: {.opportunity-card}
### Research Interns

For internship or visiting applicants, please include an expected timeline, funding status, and research interests.
:::
:::
:::


:::: {.section .why-section}
::: {.section-heading}

## Why Join Us
:::

::: {.why-grid}
::: {.why-card}
### Lab Research

Our recent work has been recognized with Best Paper awards at the ICLR World Model Workshop and the RSS Robot Representation Workshop, Oral at ICML, and invited talks at OpenAI, NVIDIA, etc.
:::

::: {.why-card}
### Global Collaboration

Our lab builds on broad collaborations across NUS and with researchers at leading institutions worldwide, including Stanford, Harvard, ETHZ, EPFL, MPI, Tsinghua, ISTA, Oxford, and beyond.
:::

::: {.why-card}
### NUS AI Research


NUS Computing is consistently recognized among the world’s leading computer science programs, ranked globally at #4 by QS, #5 by US News, and #13 by Times in recent subject rankings.
:::

::: {.why-card}
### Singapore AI Hub

Singapore is rapidly emerging as a global AI hub, powered by major national investment and growing activity from Google DeepMind, Microsoft Research, ByteDance Seed, and other AI organizations.
:::
:::
:::


::: {.section .contact-overview}
::: {.contact-card .general-contact}
::: {.contact-details}
::: {.contact-detail}
**Email:** yuejiang.liu [at] cs.stanford.edu
:::
::: {.contact-detail}
**Address:** COM 1, 13 Computing Drive, Singapore 117417
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.site-footer}
::: {.footer-copyright}
© 2026 LEMA Lab. All rights reserved.
:::
:::
